title: A Life on Our Planet
author: David Attenborough
subline: My witness statement and a vision for the future.
customHTML:
<svg viewBox="0 0 1600 2400" preserveAspectRatio="xMidYMid slice" style="position:absolute;inset:0;width:100%;height:100%">
  <!-- Earth as a half-disc on the bottom. Continents as a hairline dot-matrix (just dots scattered in a continent pattern). One dot — the LAST one — is RED. -->
  <g transform="translate(800 1700)" fill="none">
    <!-- Earth arc (lower half) -->
    <path d="M -500 0 A 500 500 0 0 0 500 0" stroke="#4c4c4c" stroke-width="2" fill="none"/>
    <line x1="-500" y1="0" x2="500" y2="0" stroke="#4c4c4c" stroke-width="1"/>
    <!-- Continents as a grid of dots in continent-ish shapes -->
    <g fill="#cccccc">
      <!-- 'Africa' shape: column of dots centered around x=0, y=200 -->
      <circle cx="-40" cy="100" r="5"/>
      <circle cx="0" cy="120" r="5"/>
      <circle cx="40" cy="100" r="5"/>
      <circle cx="-20" cy="160" r="5"/>
      <circle cx="20" cy="160" r="5"/>
      <circle cx="-40" cy="200" r="5"/>
      <circle cx="0" cy="220" r="5"/>
      <circle cx="40" cy="200" r="5"/>
      <circle cx="-20" cy="260" r="5"/>
      <circle cx="20" cy="260" r="5"/>
      <!-- 'Eurasia' top-left: -->
      <circle cx="-300" cy="80" r="5"/>
      <circle cx="-260" cy="100" r="5"/>
      <circle cx="-220" cy="80" r="5"/>
      <circle cx="-180" cy="100" r="5"/>
      <circle cx="-300" cy="140" r="5"/>
      <circle cx="-260" cy="160" r="5"/>
      <circle cx="-220" cy="140" r="5"/>
      <circle cx="-180" cy="160" r="5"/>
      <!-- 'Americas' right -->
      <circle cx="200" cy="80" r="5"/>
      <circle cx="240" cy="100" r="5"/>
      <circle cx="280" cy="80" r="5"/>
      <circle cx="320" cy="100" r="5"/>
      <circle cx="200" cy="140" r="5"/>
      <circle cx="240" cy="160" r="5"/>
      <circle cx="280" cy="140" r="5"/>
      <circle cx="320" cy="160" r="5"/>
      <circle cx="220" cy="200" r="5"/>
      <circle cx="260" cy="220" r="5"/>
      <circle cx="300" cy="200" r="5"/>
    </g>
    <!-- The RED dot: the last species / the witness -->
    <circle cx="-40" cy="350" r="9" fill="#fc1c46"/>
    <line x1="-40" y1="340" x2="-40" y2="300" stroke="#fc1c46" stroke-width="1"/>
    <text x="-40" y="395" text-anchor="middle" font-family="'Sui','Söhne','Inter',system-ui,sans-serif" font-size="14" font-weight="500" fill="#fc1c46" letter-spacing="0.2em">YOU</text>
    <!-- Y axis: years -->
    <text x="-540" y="0" text-anchor="end" font-family="'Sui','Söhne','Inter',system-ui,sans-serif" font-size="13" fill="#4c4c4c" letter-spacing="0.2em">1937</text>
    <text x="540" y="0" font-family="'Sui','Söhne','Inter',system-ui,sans-serif" font-size="13" fill="#4c4c4c" letter-spacing="0.2em">2020</text>
    <text x="0" y="-40" text-anchor="middle" font-family="'Sui','Söhne','Inter',system-ui,sans-serif" font-size="14" font-weight="500" fill="#4c4c4c" letter-spacing="0.4em">94 YEARS · ONE WITNESS</text>
  </g>
</svg>
rationale: A half-disc (Earth as a horizon) with continents rendered as a scatter of 30 graphite dots. ONE dot — labeled 'YOU' in red — sits below the equator, after a tiny red line. That's humanity's witness position. Years 1937 / 2020 mark the left and right edges. Title 280px mixed case, two lines, weight 300. The composition is a single red dot looking back at the damage.
